name: DaVinci IQ 10mm Adapter
summary: The DaVinci IQ 10mm Adapter is an essential tool for those who enjoy vaping through a bong.
description: The DaVinci IQ 10mm Adapter is an essential tool for those who enjoy vaping through a bong. It provides the ability to use your DaVinci IQ Vaporiser with any preferred bong, as well as acting as an extended mouthpiece. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer and our own experience testing the product. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
